title: will / shall
examples: Hi. What can I get for you? I'll do a latte.
I'll have a mocha with soy milk.
I'll have a mocha with soy milk.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Hi. What can I get for you? I'll do a latte.
Can I get an iced vanilla latte?
Can I get an iced vanilla latte?
Can I get an iced vanilla latte?
Could I please have a small iced vanilla latte?

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: I'd like a blueberry bagel with cream cheese on the side.
I'd like a blueberry bagel with cream cheese on the side.
I'd like a blueberry bagel with cream cheese on the side.

title: have something done
examples: Could I please have a small iced vanilla latte?
Could I please have a small iced vanilla latte?
Could I please have a small iced vanilla latte?
Could I get the croissant warmed up?
Could I get the croissant warmed up?
